symptom_vector: IO fault with filesystem call errors, read/write operation errors, permission denied errors, and file descriptor errors

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [tidb-tikv] experienced [region_pending, io_util] fault, accompanied by [raft_apply_wait, snapshot_apply_count, store_size, memory_usage, cpu_usage] anomalies.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [tidb-tikv] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [region_pending] in Metric data with 163.78% change rate (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [io_util] in Metric data with 129.14% change rate (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [productcatalogservice] in Trace data with 33x latency increase (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [region_pending, io_util] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)
